ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2003-04) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoff_start" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "w_ot" INTEGER /* Number of wins in overtime */,
  "w_gws" INTEGER /* Number of wins in game-winning shootouts */,
  "t" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "l_gws" INTEGER /* Number of losses in game-winning shootouts */,
  "l_ot" INTEGER /* Number of losses in overtime */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "gf" INTEGER /* Number of goals for */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Number of goals against */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Number of points earned */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish position in the season */,
  "playoffs" TEXT /* Playoff performance */,
  "win_streak" INTEGER /* Longest win streak during the season */,
  "loss_streak" INTEGER /* Longest loss streak during the season */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "shootout_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins decided by shootouts */,
  "shootout_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses decided by shootouts */,
  "points_percentage" REAL /* Points earned as a percentage of total possible points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player on the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "year_first_awarded" INTEGER /* Year the award was first given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "award_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game was decided by a shootout */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_rosters" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)
